items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the outcome of a persona scenario involving an 'AI agent' versus a human actor. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete results or traces that confirm the expected behavior or outcomes of this scenario. The lack of specific evidence to support the validation of the scenario leads to an inconclusive status.
